title: Lively Indian Okra Korma Curry
description: A briny, springy one-pot curry that blanches okra before simmering it in a creamy coconut‑almond sauce with a hint of white chocolate chips.

ingredients.name: frozen white chocolate chips
ingredients.notes: use sparingly to keep flavor bright

instructions: Heat a large pot over medium heat and add a splash of oil.
Add the diced onion, minced garlic, and grated ginger, sautéing until fragrant and translucent.
Stir in the ground turmeric, coriander, cumin, and cayenne pepper, cooking for 30 seconds to bloom the spices.
Add the sliced okra, coating it well with the spice mixture, and sauté for 2 minutes.
Deglaze the pot with the coconut milk, then bring to a gentle simmer.
Add the almond butter and frozen white chocolate chips, stirring until the chocolate melts into a silky sauce.
Simmer the curry for 15 minutes, allowing the okra to become tender yet crisp.
Finish with fresh lemon juice, adjusting seasoning with salt and pepper as needed.
Serve the curry hot, garnished with toasted coconut flakes if desired.
